title: Whitefurze - Basic Plant Pots - Indoor Plant Pots - Flower Pots for Small Plants, Cuttings & Seedlings - Durable Polypropylene Plant Pots for Indoor & Outdoor Use, 15cm Diameter - Set of 3
features: OPTIMISED FOR PLANT GROWTH – These plant pots ensure healthy growth for your cuttings, seedlings, and small plants. With optimal air circulation and drainage, this indoor plant pot gives your plants the perfect start

DURABLE AND LONG-LASTING – The flower pots are built to withstand daily use, indoors or outdoors. Featuring superior ventilation with multiple drainage holes, these polypropylene plant pots prevent waterlogging and support vigorous plant growth

EFFORTLESS GARDENING – Whether you're new to gardening or an experienced green thumb, these house plant pots are lightweight and easy to handle. They make planting, repotting, and rearranging your garden simple and stress-free

VERSATILE SIZES FOR YOUR NEEDS – Available in sets of 10 (7.5cm diameter), 7 (10cm diameter), 5 (12.7cm diameter) and 3 (15cm diameter). These pots fit perfectly with our range of 10 and 15cm plant pot saucers - ideal for various small plants and cuttings
CLASSIC TERRACOTTA AESTHETIC – Featuring a timeless terracotta finish, these pots complement any garden style, adding a rustic touch to both modern and traditional outdoor spaces
